# Amir Khan

> Personal portfolio and command center of Amir Khan, founder of Setupr, operator of ALTERED and Alt, and AI-assisted web builder from Jaipur, India.

Amir builds brands, websites, and AI-native systems end to end through AI-assisted prompting ("vibecoding"). Setupr is his agency for Indian founders and SMBs; ALTERED is a pre-launch D2C women's urban ethnic apparel brand; Alt is an on-premise LLM project.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Portfolio, ventures, web archive, process, writing, and booking a paid discovery call.
